PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CABINETS AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GEORGE T CHOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CABINET AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO (TATYANA REITNIK) IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TATYANA REITNIK FILED BY DEFENDANT CABINETS AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CHOW, GEORGE T CABINETS AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, GEORGE T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABINETS AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CABINETS AND BEYOND DESIGN STUDIO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
